title: Outrunner

{{Quote|That ship's gotten me through some tough scrapes. I gotta return the favor.|Dash Rendar|<ref name="TDS" />}}
The '''''Outrunner''''' was a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] purchased by [[Dash Rendar/Legends|Dash Rendar]] with the profits from his career as a freelance [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]], and [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]]. The [[Color/Legends|black]] [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was heavily armed with both [[Laser turret/Legends|laser turrets]] and [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] [[Missile launcher/Legends|launchers]], and could be powered up quickly to enable a rapid escape. Rendar used the ''Outrunner'' to disable the [[Luxury liner/Legends|luxury liner]] ''[[Star of Empire]]'' after the crew abandoned ship when the liner's [[Artificial intelligence/Legends|artificial intelligence]], [[Systems Infiltration Manager|SIM]], seized control of the vessel.

==Description==
The ''Outrunner'' was a sleek [[Color/Legends|black]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] that functioned as a small [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]]. The ship was so streamlined that the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|boy]] [[Zak Arranda/Legends|Zak Arranda]] thought it resembled a [[Missile/Legends|missile]] about to be fired. The ''Outrunner''{{'s}} systems could be brought online quickly, allowing for quick getaways. The vessel was armed with multiple [[Laser turret/Legends|laser turrets]]—at least one of which was a [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]], which could be retracted into a hole in the ship's hull—and forward-facing [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] [[Missile launcher/Legends|launchers]]. The ship could be operated by a single [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]].<ref name="TDS" />

==History==
[[File:Dashliveaction.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Dash Rendar, owner of the ''Outrunner'']]
At some point prior to late [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]],<ref name="TDS" /><ref name="NEGC">''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]''</ref> the freelance [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] [[Dash Rendar/Legends|Dash Rendar]] purchased the ''Outrunner'' using the profits from his early career.<ref name="NEGC" /> He went on to use the ship to escape from several difficult situations.<ref name="TDS" /> Approximately [[1 ABY/Legends|one year]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]],<ref name="NEGC" /> Rendar, traveling under a false name, took the ''Outrunner'' aboard the [[Haj Shipping Lines]] [[Luxury liner/Legends|luxury liner]] ''[[Star of Empire]]'' with the intention of stealing the vessel and selling it to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] to be converted into a [[Warship/Legends|warship]].<ref name="TDS" />

While Rendar was aboard, the ''Star of Empire''{{'s}} [[Artificial intelligence/Legends|artificial intelligence]], [[Systems Infiltration Manager|SIM]], seized control of the vessel, causing most of the passengers and crew to abandon ship. Trapped aboard with the [[Youngling/Legends|children]] Zak and [[Tash Arranda/Legends|Tash Arranda]] and their uncle [[Mammon Hoole]], Rendar attempted to regain control of the ship, only to come under frequent attack from SIM and the ship's [[Droid/Legends|droid]] complement. Rendar, Hoole, and the Arrandas eventually made their way to the [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]], where both the ''Outrunner'' and Hoole's ship, the [[Shroud (starship)|''Shroud'']], were docked. Rendar quickly powered up the ''Outrunner'' and used its turbolaser to blast a hole in the hangar doors, allowing both ships to escape the liner. Rendar used the ''Outrunner''{{'s}} weapons to disable the ''Star of Empire''{{'s}} [[Engine/Legends|engines]] before contacting the Alliance to arrange the sale of the crippled liner.<ref name="TDS" />

==Owners and operators==
The ''Outrunner'' was owned by the freelance pilot, [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]], and [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] Dash Rendar. Born to a wealthy [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Rendar family|family]], Rendar studied at the [[Carida Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]] on [[Carida/Legends|Carida]] until his [[Stanton Rendar|brother]] crashed a [[Doriella's Mystress|freighter]] into the [[Galactic Museum/Legends|Imperial Museum]]. Expelled and banished by the vengeful [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], Rendar became a successful smuggler and mercenary. Rendar acquired the ''Outrunner'' as a second ship, to supplement his primary freighter, the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[YT-2400 light freighter/Legends|YT-2400 light freighter]] [[Outrider/Legends|''Outrider'']].<ref name="NEGC" />

==Behind the scenes==
The character of Dash Rendar was created for the [[1996]] multimedia project [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire|''Shadows of the Empire'']], which established the name of Rendar's ship as the ''Outrider''.<ref name="SOTEn">[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]]</ref><ref name="SOTEg">[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (video game)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' video game]]</ref> The [[1998]] young reader novel ''[[Galaxy of Fear: The Doomsday Ship]]'' by [[John Whitman]] featured both Rendar and his ship, which was erroneously called the ''Outrunner''. In Rendar's entry in the [[2002]] reference book ''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'', [[Daniel Wallace]] [[Retroactive continuity|retroactively established]] that the ''Outrunner'' was a second ship that Rendar purchased after acquiring the ''Outrider''.<ref name="TDS" /><ref name="NEGC" /><ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref>
